name: Alicia Markova
description: British ballerina, choreographer, director and teacher of classical ballet (1910-2004)
abstract: Dame Alicia Markova DBE (1 December 1910 – 2 December 2004) was a British ballerina and a choreographer, director and teacher of classical ballet. Most noted for her career with Sergei Diaghilev's Ballets Russes and touring internationally, she was widely considered to be one of the greatest classical ballet dancers of the twentieth cent…

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Stravinsky composed the music for the ballet duo of Alicia Markova and Anton Dolan
